title: Promote automotive products and services
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Promote automotive products and services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop knowledge of automotive products and services

pcs.text: Research and clarify the use, purpose and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research and interpret comparisons between available products and services1.3 Research and interpret workplace promotional and marketing activities relevant to products and services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and clarify the use, purpose and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research and interpret comparisons between available products and services1.3 Research and interpret workplace promotional and marketing activities relevant to products and services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and clarify the use, purpose and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research and interpret comparisons between available products and services1.3 Research and interpret workplace promotional and marketing activities relevant to products and services.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop knowledge of automotive products and services

elements.title: Identify and match customer needs to products and services

pcs.text: Determine customer buying motives and requirements through questioning, active listening and non-verbal communication cues2.2 Guide customer to product or service that matches their identified buying motives and requirements2.3 Explain and highlight features and benefits of product or service and relevance to customer requirements 2.4 Conduct and align demonstrations to customer buying motives and requirements according to workplace marketing and sales practices2.5 Use selling techniques according to workplace procedures and legal requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine customer buying motives and requirements through questioning, active listening and non-verbal communication cues2.2 Guide customer to product or service that matches their identified buying motives and requirements2.3 Explain and highlight features and benefits of product or service and relevance to customer requirements 2.4 Conduct and align demonstrations to customer buying motives and requirements according to workplace marketing and sales practices2.5 Use selling techniques according to workplace procedures and legal requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine customer buying motives and requirements through questioning, active listening and non-verbal communication cues2.2 Guide customer to product or service that matches their identified buying motives and requirements2.3 Explain and highlight features and benefits of product or service and relevance to customer requirements 2.4 Conduct and align demonstrations to customer buying motives and requirements according to workplace marketing and sales practices2.5 Use selling techniques according to workplace procedures and legal requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and match customer needs to products and services

elements.title: Maximise sales opportunities

pcs.text: Identify and apply opportunities for making additional sales 3.2 Assess on-sell opportunities through knowledge of customer needs and available complementary automotive products and services3.3 Determine customer need and interest in additional or complementary products and services 3.4 Discuss and promote benefits of additional or complementary products and services to customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply opportunities for making additional sales 3.2 Assess on-sell opportunities through knowledge of customer needs and available complementary automotive products and services3.3 Determine customer need and interest in additional or complementary products and services 3.4 Discuss and promote benefits of additional or complementary products and services to customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply opportunities for making additional sales 3.2 Assess on-sell opportunities through knowledge of customer needs and available complementary automotive products and services3.3 Determine customer need and interest in additional or complementary products and services 3.4 Discuss and promote benefits of additional or complementary products and services to customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maximise sales opportunities

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
